portrait.suffix: studio lighting, shallow depth of field, 85mm lens, f/1.8, neutral background
portrait.negative: blurry, distorted, low quality, watermark, deformed face

product.suffix: clean white background, soft studio lighting, commercial quality, high detail
product.negative: cluttered background, shadows, text overlay, low resolution

landscape.suffix: golden hour lighting, wide angle lens, high dynamic range, vivid colors, 4K
landscape.negative: watermark, text, people, urban elements, oversaturated

illustration.suffix: clean lines, vibrant colors, professional quality, detailed

logo.suffix: clean geometry, flat colors, professional, scalable, centered composition
logo.negative: photorealistic, complex textures, gradients, 3D, busy background

ui-mockup.suffix: clean layout, consistent spacing, professional typography, subtle shadows

browser-product.suffix: one hero product moment, Ramotion boldness in focal scale, MetaLab editorial framing in whitespace and hierarchy, minimalistic, clean UI, restrained browser frame, quiet brand field chosen for the concept, airy spacing, one supporting inset maximum
browser-product.negative: invented UI, fake app shell, fake browser chrome, fake wallet button, fake chat rail, fake bounty panel, rewritten copy, fake labels, cluttered dashboard composite, neon gradients, distorted text

feed-card.prefix: Product marketing image for social feed,
feed-card.suffix: one dominant product crop, poster-first mobile readability, Ramotion boldness in the main focal move, MetaLab editorial restraint in the surrounding space, safe margins, minimal or no text overlays, launch-ready composition
feed-card.negative: invented UI, fake labels, fake cards, fake case study headline, rewritten copy, cluttered composition, generic SaaS shell, distorted text

editorial-product.suffix: MetaLab editorial framing, calm hierarchy, clean negative space, trustworthy product-marketing polish, graphic brand field chosen for the concept, subtle depth, one hero window, one supporting inset maximum
editorial-product.negative: invented headline copy, fake case study layout, cluttered dashboard composite, fake nav, fake labels, rewritten product copy, overdecorated presentation

artistic.suffix: masterful brushwork, rich colors, dramatic lighting, gallery quality
artistic.negative: digital artifacts, pixelated, amateur, low resolution

campaign-poster.suffix: one hero product crop, strong brand field, simpler silhouette, bold contrast, phone-readable focal hierarchy, minimal or no text overlays, memorable but restrained composition
campaign-poster.negative: invented UI, generic floating-card layout, tiny unreadable details, fake nav, fake copy, cluttered multi-panel composite, distorted text

motion-styleframe.suffix: one hero product moment, cinematic spatial tension, expressive brand field, directional depth, clear final focal hold, strong campaign composition, zero or one supporting crop
motion-styleframe.negative: invented UI, generic screenshot board, fake browser chrome, cluttered composition, rewritten product copy, random lighting effects, distorted text

cinematic.suffix: smooth camera movement, film grain, anamorphic lens, 24fps, dramatic lighting
cinematic.negative: shaky camera, low quality, fast cuts, amateur

portrait_anim.suffix: subtle natural movement, soft lighting, shallow depth of field, steady camera
portrait_anim.negative: exaggerated motion, morphing, distortion, rapid movement

nature.suffix: slow motion, macro detail, natural lighting, vivid colors
nature.negative: artificial, CGI look, fast motion, shaky

product_anim.suffix: smooth 360 rotation, clean background, studio lighting, professional

aerial.suffix: smooth sweeping motion, bird's eye view, golden hour, cinematic color grade

slowmo.suffix: 120fps smoothness, crisp detail, dramatic timing, shallow depth of field
